overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character carrying a child through a destroyed burning village at night, following a guide toward a harbor with ships. The scene transitions from narrow rubble-filled streets to an open wooden dock area, illuminated by firelight and moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rubble street between burning village huts

agents.ego_description: character carrying child on back, carefully navigating through narrow rubble-filled street

notable_agents.action: guide character in dark robes walking ahead, leading the way through the destruction

entered.detail: wooden structure engulfed in flames with smoke rising
collapsing building with intense fire illumination
silhouetted palm fronds against the firelit sky
scattered stones, broken wood, and debris covering the path

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a narrow enclosed path through a destroyed village, with burning huts on both sides casting flickering orange light. The camera follows a guide character through rubble-strewn ground, with palm trees visible overhead against the dark smoke-filled sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rubble field approaching harbor with moonlit sky

events.description: exits narrow village street into open area with clear view of night sky
full moon becomes visible through clouds, adding cool blue light to the fire illumination

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the guide across the open rubble field toward the distant harbor

notable_agents.action: guide maintaining steady pace ahead through the open destruction

entered.detail: bright full moon visible through scattered clouds in the night sky
multiple burning buildings visible on the horizon
distant view of water and ship masts becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up from the narrow street into a wide rubble field under a moonlit sky. The full moon becomes visible through clouds, mixing cool blue light with the warm fire glow. The path continues toward a distant harbor where ship masts are becoming visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden harbor dock with sailing ships

events.description: ground surface transitions from rubble to wooden dock planks
large sailing ship comes into full view at the dock

agents.ego_description: walking onto the wooden dock following the guide toward the waiting ship

notable_agents.action: guide approaching the ship, moving toward the boarding area

entered.detail: weathered wooden pier surface with visible planks and gaps
large wooden sailing vessel with mast and rigging docked at the pier
dark water visible between the dock and the ship
tall wooden mast with rigging silhouetted against the moon

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions onto a wooden harbor dock, leaving the rubble behind. The ground becomes wooden planks as the camera approaches a large sailing ship moored at the pier. The full moon illuminates the scene from the right, reflecting off the harbor water, while the burning village remains visible in the distant background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a burning village that gradually opens into a moonlit harbor. It begins within a narrow enclosed path, following a guide through rubble-strewn ground flanked by burning huts that cast a flickering orange glow under a smoke-filled sky. As the path widens, the scene expands into a vast rubble field where the warm firelight blends with the cool blue light of a full moon emerging through the clouds. The camera then moves forward toward the horizon, transitioning from the debris onto the wooden planks of a harbor dock. Finally, the movement concludes as the camera approaches a large sailing ship moored at the pier, with the moon reflecting off the water while the distant fires of the village fade into the background.
